● I can see the issue — way too much vertical air between title, cards, toolbar, and charts. The gap-6 p-8 plus

● Tightened: outer is now h-screen overflow-hidden (prevents the page from stretching to a huge canvas height),
  main scrolls internally, h1 has m-0 to kill browser default top/bottom margin, padding reduced to px-8 py-6,
  section gap gap-5, chart stack gap-3. The huge gaps should be gone — HMR will refresh the prototype widget.
